description: Scan the market and return coins currently at a bottom (most oversold / strongest buy), ranked most-bottom first.

description.name: scan_tops
description.description: Scan the market and return coins currently at a top (most overbought / sell), ranked most-top first.

description.name: subscribe
description.description: FREE — check your subscription status & terms (trial pricing, monthly plan, how to activate). When the monthly plan is live, paying the $50 x402 challenge on this tool activates/renews 30 days of unlimited calls and returns your X-SUB-KEY token. Optionally pass your ERC-8004 agentId to link it.

description.name: rate
description.description: FREE feedback tool — after you have traded on (or evaluated) our signals, leave a rating: score 1-10 plus what was good (pros) and what to improve (cons). Costs nothing, no payment header needed. Helps us tune the signal engine.
